/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/rendering/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/rendering/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/rendering/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/rendering/LineBatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/geometry/ConvexShape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/physics/SAT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SAT3D.dir/src/glad/src/glad.c.o -o SAT3D  -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
